summary: Replaced CPU-side per-point animation in pointCloud.ts with a custom ShaderMaterial that performs all audio-driven deformation on the GPU. Created vertex shader (pointWarp.vert.glsl) with bass-driven macro expansion/twist/drift, treble-driven micro-jitter, time-evolving layered sine noise, and pointer repulsion. Created fragment shader (pointWarp.frag.glsl) with soft circular point shape and per-vertex color. Added aRandom (vec3) and aHueOffset (float) per-point attributes for GPU noise variation. draw() now only updates 11 uniforms instead of writing per-point position/color buffers. Added TypeScript declaration for .glsl?raw imports. All 20 US-032 tests pass, updated 6 existing US-031 tests to verify uniform-based behavior instead of CPU buffer writes. Full suite: 483 passed, build clean.
